step_by_step_thinking:
Maculopapular rash is typically observed in:
- Dengue fever (caused by flavivirus)
- Measles (rubeola virus)
- Chicken pox/zoster (varicella-zoster virus)
It is NOT typically observed in rubella (german measles).
